programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: El Noruego no cumple con sus responsabilidades con la casa por lo que es expulsado por Gaspar. El Noruego se embarca en una travesía sin saber que lleva un ángel guardián. Segunda parte.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: Peluzín tiene éxito con un nuevo método de protesta, mientras El Noruego y Jony dan sus primeros pasos en la "cossa nostra"

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: Un incidente hace que Irma revalore su vida y desaparezca. Mientras el Abuelo y el Noruego tratan de encontrarla, Gaspar y Jonathan tratan de encontrarle su lugar a Olaf en la familia.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: El Abuelo se topa de manera inesperada con su Némesis de la infancia y junto con Gaspar se embarca en una cruzada para recuperar un objeto muy preciado de manos de su archienemigo.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: Mientras que el Abuelo está vuelto loco por encontrar su revista favorita, Peluzín desentierra la verdad sobre su verdadera familia.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: El Noruego busca desesperadamente una forma para recuperar su fortuna, mientras que el Abuelo se hace adicto al videojuego de moda.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: Independientemente de resultado de las elecciones norteamericanas, Donald Trump decide declarale la guerra a México y LFDB se embarca en una misión especial para derrocar al tirano Trump.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: El Noruego decide ir a NY a conocer a la verdadera Ivanka pero en el camino el grupo se separa de el Abuelo y Peluzín.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: El Abuelo, con la ayuda de Gaspar, hace una lista de todas las cosas que quiere hacer antes de morir. Peluzin y el Noruego están adictos a un videojuego.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: Los del Barrio llegan a su edificio y se dan cuenta que está rodeado por un gran muro que les impide la entrada.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: La Familia del Barrio se va de vacaciones a Acapulco, invitados por Gaspar. Después de una gran borrachera en el Baby'O, el abuelo amanece en la casa de Acapulco Shore.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: El Noruego se muda a un lujoso departamento y se dedica a buscar a un nuevo roommate, mientras que El Abuelo y Jonathan se pelean por quedarse con el cuarto una vez que el Noruego dejo el departamento.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: El Abuelo sufre un accidente y mientras esta al filo de la muerte revalora su vida desde sus inicios recordando una parte de su infancia, la que busca esclarecer una vez recuperada su salud.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: Viendo la tele en la sala de su casa de repente el Abuelo y el Noruego son golpeados con una nueva idea para lucrar en un popular programa de TV. Mientras tanto Peluzín se aventaja de un descuido de Gaspar.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: Gaspar y el Abuelo se topan con una familia muy peculiar, situación que el Abuelo busca aprovechar, mientras que Peluzín y Pitipu buscan curar a Don Sebas de una extraña adicción.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: Jonathan y Gaspar buscan darle una lección al Abuelo en en Día del Padre, mientras que el Noruego se siente que no es valorado por Olaf y junto con Peluzín deciden tomar cartas en el asunto.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: El Noruego decide recuperar a su antigua mascota tlacuache llamada Chofri, mientras que el Abuelo atraviesa por un lapso de demencia senil y depende de Gaspar salvarlo.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: El noruego busca crear un vínculo de nuevo con su hijo Olaf por medio de un regalo, mientras que el Abuelo, Johnatan, Peluzín y todo el edificio están vueltos locos con los álbumes de estampitas del mundial 2018.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: El edificio Pino es desalojado por causas de fuerza mayor y todos tienen que buscar donde vivir, mientras que el Abuelo se deja caer en una espiral descendente debido a su gran ego.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: El Noruego se lanza como candidato a Presidente del Condominio. Sin embargo, un oponente inesperado eclipsa sus planes en plena campaña.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: El Noruego se enamora de la estatua de cera de Ivanka Trump y toda la familia decide hacer un viaje y atravesar todo el país en auto hasta Nueva York.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: El Abuelo encuentra la manera de aprovecharse del sistema de seguros a costa de Peluzín. Mientras Gaspar les encarga al Noruego y a Jonathan que recojan en el aeropuerto a un familiar que viene de visita de los Estados Unidos.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: El abuelo se ahoga con un hueso de pollo y LFDB se ve forzada a buscar ayuda de emergencia, mientras que el Noruego y Peluzín deciden ingresar a un gimnasio y competir por los resultados.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: Gaspar les restringe el dinero al Abuelo y al Noruego ocasionando que el Noruego tenga que consumir un licor hecho en casa por Peluzín lo que lo deja ciego.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: Peluzín trata de averiguar el paradero de su madre con la ayuda de sus dos nuevos papás, mientras que Gaspar invita al Abuelo, el Noruego y Johnny a el nuevo restaurante de moda.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: El Noruego cansado de que todo mundo lo busque solo por su dinero busca a Pitipú para que le ayude a idear un plan, mientras que Peluzín se embarca en el mundo de la robótica.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: El Abuelo consigue una ocupación donde se siente como pez en el agua, mientras que Peluzín entra en un proyecto experimental que le traerá muchos problemas a todos.

programme.desc: One rainy afternoon, a man seeks Lupin's help on behalf of a young woman. The woman is actually Fujiko, who is after a diamond known as "The Star of Killamanjaro". The diamond was implanted into the chest of a mob boss.

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd: Part 1
programme.desc: Three scrolls contain the secret of creating a blade like the Zantetsuken. Lupin wants to steal them as a matter of family pride because his grandfather, Arsene Lupin, stole them back in the 19th century.

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd: Part 1
programme.desc: Napoleon once owned a deck of fortune-telling cards that are now in the hands of a millionaire known as Mr. Gold. Lupin plans to steal them during Mr. Gold's birthday party, and Zenigata plans to stop him. Lupin succeeds in stealing the mysterious cards.

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd: Part 1
programme.desc: Lupin and the gang aim to steal the blueprints for a new computer. In their way is a man skilled with the machinegun and his hit-man partner named Poon, who used to be Fujiko's partner in the past.

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd: Part 1
programme.desc: Lupin and Baron Ukraine are both after the world's most skilled counterfeiter. Lupin would have no problem beating the Baron, but the Baron has hired a man called Flinch along with Fujiko and gave them instructions to kill Lupin.

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd: Part 1
programme.desc: Someone is posing as Lupin and blowing up bridges, causing a lot of damage and injuries. Lupin and Jigen discover that the bomber is trying to force an armored car to travel along a route of his choosing.

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd: Part 1
programme.desc: Lupin and Baron Ukraine are both after the world's most skilled counterfeiter. Lupin would have no problem beating the Baron, but the Baron has hired a man called Flinch along with Fujiko and gave them instructions to kill Lupin.

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd: Part 1
programme.desc: Mamo Kyosuke claims that Lupin will disappear from the world in four days. He claims that he is a time traveler from 2874 seeking revenge. Apparently, Lupin XIII destroyed the Mamo clan on March 2874.

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd: Part 1
programme.desc: Lupin and Fujiko are both after the legendary Eye of the Nile emerald. It is going to be a wedding gift presented at a wedding being held on a yacht.

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd: Part 1
programme.desc: Zenigata has been invited to an international police convention in Europe; his chief wants him to go, but Zenigata does not want to since Lupin has declared that he will steal a gold bust within the next three days.

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd: Part 1
programme.desc: Fujiko goads Lupin into stealing a large shipment of diamonds. Lupin takes the task despite Jigen's protest that Fujiko is playing them for fools. Of course, Jigen is right.

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd: Part 1
programme.desc: Fujiko invites Lupin and the gang to a famous nightclub owned by the sexy Hoshikage Rinko. Only Goemon refuses. This was a wise move as Rinko places timebombs on Fujiko, Jigen, and Lupin.

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd: Part 1
programme.desc: Smith is an art thief that is selling stolen paintings under the guise of a beauty contest. Lupin decides he wants in on the action as well, promising to steal away the treasured paintings.

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd: Part 1
programme.desc: Inspector Ganimard III is the grandson of Lupin I's archnemesis. He has come to Japan as the head of security for the 1972 France Fair but also intends to restore his family's honor by arresting Lupin III.

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd: Part 1
programme.desc: Someone is committing thefts under Lupin's name. Lupin follows the imposters back to their island hideout. He has apparently stumbled into a whole island of thieves.

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd: Part 1
programme.desc: Rie is being held captive though she does not realize it. She believes the man holding her is a friend of her father, Ken Makita. Lupin shows up to rescue her.

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd: Part 1
programme.desc: Gordon, an FBI computer specialist, is in Japan to operate a computer capable of predicting crimes and determining how to stop them. The Metropolitan Police Department hopes that this will finally help them capture Lupin.

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd: Part 1
programme.desc: A disputed horde of recently discovered ancient gold coins draws the attention of Lupin and company. As the ownership of the coins is disputed, Lupin decides to settle the matter on his own by stealing them from the Dai Nippon Bank.

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd: Bye Bye, Lady Liberty
programme.desc: Foiled repeatedly by the predictions of Interpol's supercomputer, professional looter Lupin III has settled down. A sinister secret organization and a young computer genius are thrown into the mix. And whose side is the buxom Fujiko on this time?

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd: The Hemingway Papers
programme.desc: The legendary last manuscript of the great Ernest Hemingway tells of a buried treasure on an island far away… and thief extraordinaire Lupin is on the trail! But he gets caught up in a local civil war, Lupin will have to keep his wits or risk his life!

programme.title: La venganza de los ex

programme.title: Súper Shore

programme.desc: Los humanos perfeccionan y desarrollan diseños de armas a lo largo de milenios para ganar ventaja.

programme.desc: Angélica juega a la psicóloga con los bebés, pero su consejo le sale al revés. Cuando Carlitos comienza a estornudar siempre que Kimi aparece, teme que pueda ser alérgico a ella.

programme.title: Aventuras en pañales
programme.desc: Los bebés causan problemas a un experto en fengshui. Los bebés piensan que el acuario en forma de barco que visitan se está hundiendo.

programme.title: Aventuras en pañales
programme.desc: Los bebés intentan ayudar a sus padres, pero todo se complica. Los bebés creen que Dil se convirtió en un muñeco luego de que Angélica lo reemplazara por el suyo para ganar una exposición.

programme.title: Aventuras en pañales
programme.desc: Angélica cree que la nueva empleada del café es su muñeca Cynthia que cobró vida. Angélica promete ser buena con los bebés para siempre si Phil acepta que unas niñas de cuatro años jueguen al niño bonito con él.

programme.title: Aventuras en pañales
programme.desc: Una serie de misterios surgen cuando los bebés y sus padres emprenden un viaje en tren para asistir a la segunda luna de miel de Boris y Minka, la cual se celebra en otra ciudad.

programme.title: Aventuras en pañales
programme.desc: Didi anuncia que regresará a la escuela y Angélica convence a los bebés de que el tiempo irá para atrás. Carlitos se despierta de una siesta sin sueños y los bebés deciden buscar su sueño perdido.

programme.title: Aventuras en pañales
programme.desc: Los padres recuerdan los primeros pasos de los niños, pero ellos los recuerdan de una forma diferente. Angélica contrata a Harold para que sea su asistente personal.

programme.title: Aventuras en pañales
programme.desc: Cuando los cachorros de Firulais y Fifi son puestos en adopción, Hugo le ruega a Didi que se queden con uno. Los bebés se embarcan en una fantasía, batallando a la Malvada Señorita Angelique en una exótica tienda de mascotas.

programme.title: Aventuras en pañales
programme.desc: Los bebés se dirigen al Club Fred, un lugar para descansar y relajarse. Una vez allí, los bebés deben encontrar el tesoro de Barba Azul para salvarle las vacaciones a todos.

programme.title: Aventuras en pañales
programme.desc: Lili está preocupada porque no es tan perfecta como podría ser, pero luego descubre que disfruta más de su verdadero yo que el que finge ser.

programme.title: Aventuras en pañales
programme.desc: Los bebés se divierten en el parque de diversiones de alta tecnología con temática de Navidad diseñado por Stu Pickles para la primera Navidad de Dil. Angélica hace que Santa renuncie.

programme.title: Aventuras en pañales
programme.desc: Los bebés descubren que la Navidad significa más que regalos y tradiciones, cuando se encuentran atrapados en las decoraciones navideñas de Hugo. Angélica impulsa a Santa a renunciar.

programme.title: Aventuras en pañales
programme.desc: Cuando llevan a los bebés al circo, Carlitos teme convertirse en un payaso. Cuando Angélica ve una entrega de premios en televisión, los bebés deciden hacer su propia entrega de premios.

programme.title: Aventuras en pañales
programme.desc: Los bebés encuentran una galería de juegos medievales que los lleva a una fantasía para salvar a Taffy de un feroz dragón llamado Gracko. Los bebés intentan hacer más fuerte a Dil para que pueda jugar con ellos.

programme.title: The Steve Wilkos Show
programme.desc: Jeanette witnessed her husband John kissing a man named Russell, who was living with them, but John claims that Russell was trying to homewreck. Then Vanessa is desperate to put an end to her boyfriend Robert's constant accusations of cheating.

programme.title: The Steve Wilkos Show: Look What You Did to Your Baby
programme.desc: Dennis claims his ex-girlfriend Kendal keeps tied down with pregnancy lies! He wants to know if their daughter is even his! Will Steve’s DNA test results finally let them move on?

programme.title: The Jerry Springer Show
programme.desc: Chris claims that Brianna's very controlling and doesn't let him go out to do the things that make him happy. Then, Chad is here to propose to his girlfriend Star but before they book the caterer, Star has a little confession to make.

programme.title: The Jerry Springer Show
programme.desc: Cindy feels no love at all for her sister, Morgan. She will tell her today that she is stealing Morgan's man for good! Next Emario wants to marry Kathryn, but first she needs to come clean and reveal her secret profession as a prostitute!

programme.title: The Jerry Springer Show
programme.desc: These guests say love is the last thing on their minds, it is all about the sex and they're not sorry.

programme.title: The Jerry Springer Show
programme.desc: Mistie suspects that her boyfriend has been cheating, but she never expected with her best friend, Allison! Next Jose's 2 boyfriends didn't know that they've been sharing Jose. Finally, Antjuan hates that his girlfriend strips for a living.

programme.title: The Jerry Springer Show
programme.desc: Amy is here to confront her husband, Fury's, ex-mistress, Shauna, for continuing to butt into their lives. Shauna says she loves Fury but admits that she's been sleeping with her cousin, Becky! Then Becky reveals to all that she slept with Fury!

programme.title: The Jerry Springer Show
programme.desc: Black wants to leave his fiance Justine to be with a woman named Star. But he's about to find out that Star is actually a man. Then, Jay has to reveal to Brittany the shocking secret that he slept with her sister Donna.

programme.title: The Jerry Springer Show
programme.desc: Our guests have been making a living by laying on their backs and they love it. They're here to shake their sheets clean and let their loved ones know that for a certain price they can be bought.

programme.title: The Jerry Springer Show
programme.desc: Jake is here because he says that he knew he was in love with his girlfriend Lindsey the first time she ever asked him for a side of cheese. Then Shaina says she's in love with not one but two beautiful girls.

programme.title: The Jerry Springer Show
programme.desc: Dallas confesses to his fiancé that he’s cheating on her with her maid of honor Brooke. Rickey and Beverly fight for the same woman and Jennifer learns about Derek’s other woman!

programme.title: The Jerry Springer Show
programme.desc: Beth and Eric have been dating for a year. But Eric began sleeping with Beth's sister with Beth's permission! Beth now says she only gave it because she was scared of losing Eric. Both women claim to love Eric and want him for their own.

programme.title: The Jerry Springer Show
programme.desc: Spirited Betty is in love with Greg, a married man, and is here to break up his home and steal him from his wife, Kirsten. Then Christina says her boyfriend, Sean, does everything she wants except he won't stop sleeping with Megan!

programme.title: The Jerry Springer Show
programme.desc: Bambi gives us a rare, honest look into her ultra-exclusive lifestyle in LA. Tiffany confronts C.T. over a rotten business deal.

programme.title: El show de Jerry Springer
programme.desc: Hope ha venido a enfrentarse a su mejor amiga, Laura, por robarle a su novio, Joey, y luego comprometerse con él. A continuación, John dirá que no tiene la culpa por acostarse con la mejor amiga de su novia.

programme.title: El show de Jerry Springer
programme.desc: Misty odia tanto al marido que se acaba de casar con su mejor amiga que está dispuesta a pagar el divorcio. ¡Lucus está dispuesto a divorciarse de su esposa de 6 semanas si su familia no deja de entrometerse!

programme.title: El show de Jerry Springer
programme.desc: James está comprometido con Amanda, pero ahora confiesa lo de Melanie. Después, Jewel compite por el amor de su amante cuando Christa anuncia que lo quiere para ella.

programme.title: El show de Jerry Springer
programme.desc: ¡Anitra se entera de quién es realmente su pareja Kevin! Después, James está a semanas de casarse con Liz, pero tiene dos importantes secretos que contar. Después, Elliot dice que cometió el peor error de su vida al ser infiel a su novio, Rob.

programme.title: El show de Jerry Springer
programme.desc: Jaycee le demuestra a Brandy que nunca es correcto ser infiel y arruinar a una familia. Casi cree que su prometido podría aprender una lección de Kevin, un antiguo invitado. Además, concertamos una cita entre la espectadora Tamara y el invitado Nathan.

programme.title: El show de Jerry Springer
programme.desc: John está siendo infiel a su esposa Destinee con Cici, pero Cici también tiene algunos secretos. Entonces, Lala suelta un bombazo a su novio. Además, Michael y su esposa Tayliana tienen secretos que revelarse mutuamente.

programme.title: El show de Jerry Springer
programme.desc: Jake se acostó con el prometido de su hermano Joe. Después, Danny dice que dejará a su prometida Heather por una dama de compañía profesional llamada Chelsi. Además, hay más historias de matrimonios disparatados.

programme.title: El show de Jerry Springer
programme.desc: Carlton ha venido a revelarle a su novia que lleva una doble vida gay. Además, Tom Bergeron de "Bailando con las Estrellas" de la TV hará de juez famoso en un concurso de baile. Luego, Crystal le revela a su marido, Bobby, su infidelidad.

programme.title: El show de Jerry Springer
programme.desc: Khloe está dispuesta a contarle a Jamal que quizá no sea la mujer que él cree que es. Nick ha venido a confrontar a su esposa Barbara y al hombre con el que se ha estado acostando, Jason.

programme.title: El show de Jerry Springer
programme.desc: En este episodio especial, un grupo de espectadores selectos se enfrentará a algunos de los más memorables invitados de Jerry.

programme.title: El show de Jerry Springer
programme.desc: Johnny quiere que su novia Aimee lo acepte como es. Después, Maya viene al programa para confrontar a su novio Eric sobre sus costumbres.

programme.title: El show de Jerry Springer
programme.desc: Nikki revela sus aventuras fraternales secretas, pero ¿podrá Joe perdonarla? Después, "Six O'Clock" confiesa que ha estado acostándose con el novio de su amiga Carisa por dinero.

programme.title: El show de Jerry Springer
programme.desc: Je'nier tiene un secreto difícil de contar a Preston. Después, ¡son Nikki y Nikky las que persiguen al mismo hombre! ¿Ganará Nikki o Nikky el corazón de Kevin? ¿Kevin merece el amor de alguna de las dos mujeres?

programme.title: El show de Jerry Springer
programme.desc: En el Show de Jerry Springer de hoy, una batalla de novias. Nicole le da un ultimátum a su amante: o la dejas o me pierdes. ¡Jerry ve cómo saltan chispas en el programa de hoy!

programme.title: Gata Salvaje
programme.desc: Luis Mario y Jacqueline se dan un beso para hacer rabiar a Rosaura. Lo consiguen porque ella cuando los ve se voltea y comienza a preguntarse cuando se conocieron para gustarse.

programme.title: Gata Salvaje
programme.desc: Jacqueline le dice a Rosaura que ya no está interesada en Silvano, que ahora quiere a Luis Mario y que no se meta en sus vidas. Rosaura le dice a ella que ya no quiere casarse con Silvano.

programme.title: Gata Salvaje
programme.desc: Silvano y Rosaura tienen una gran discusión por lo del beso de Luis Mario y Jacqueline. Los dos están celosos. Karina le dice a Rodrigo que él debe hacer esa gira y ella lo estará esperando.

programme.title: Gata Salvaje
programme.desc: Eva le pega un bastonazo a Doña Cruz y despues va hacia la puerta y la cierra, tomándose la llave. Samuel va lentamente hacia la habitación de la niña. Eva toma a la niña y se la lleva.

programme.title: Gata Salvaje
programme.desc: María Julia les dice a Iván y a Karina que Adriana tiene una amenaza de aborto. Guillermo se va y Luisana se queda, pensando que ojalá que lo de Guillermo sea verdad y la ayude a ser feliz.

programme.title: Gata Salvaje
programme.desc: Eva penetra en la mansión de Doña Cruz para llevar a cabo su plan de venganza en contra de Rosaura, al secuestrar a su pequeña hija Gabrielita.

programme.title: Gata Salvaje
programme.desc: En los pantanos, Luis Mario se asegura del bienestar de su pequeña hija Gabrielita, al pedirle a Silvia que lleve la niña a la mansión de Doña Cruz.

programme.title: Gata Salvaje
programme.desc: Eva reta a Luis Mario, amenazándolo con causar la muerte de Rosaura a pesar de su ofrecimiento de cambiar su vida por la de Rosaura. Rosaura es víctima de la amenaza de Eva.

programme.title: Gata Salvaje
programme.desc: Tras ser testigos de la horrorosa muerte de Eva, Luis Mario y Rosaura informan a todos de lo acontecido en cuanto llegan a la mansión de Doña Cruz.

programme.title: Gata Salvaje
programme.desc: Al pesar de su profundo sentimiento de amor por Iván, Jimena se niega a su reconciliación con el muchacho al poner a Adriana como un obstáculo para llevar a cabo su felicidad.

programme.title: Gata Salvaje
programme.desc: Rosaura habla por teléfono con Andrés Bustamante y le cuenta la verdad sobre Camelia. Andrés se muestra desconfiado pero Rosaura le dice que ella no tiene nada que esconder, incluso le dio su nombre.

programme.title: Gata Salvaje
programme.desc: En la clínica, tras saber del estado vegetal de Patricio, Estrella toma la decisión de otorgarle su perdón al hombre que en el pasado enloqueció a su madre.

programme.title: Gata Salvaje
programme.desc: Silvano visita a Rosaura y empieza a explicarle que se ha dado cuenta que siente amor por Jacqueline y que también sabe que Rosaura nunca va a poder olvidar a Luis Mario.

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Luffy is in an all-out, all-you-can-eat battle! As Cracker's endless stream of Biscuit Warriors marches on, Luffy's endless appetite is put to the test. Meanwhile, Reiju helps Sanji to straighten himself out before he meets his fiancée.

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Luffy needs to think fast in order to turn the battle in his favor - filled with biscuits, he debuts a new Gear Four attack that has lasting repercussions! Meanwhile, Chopper and Carrot find Sanji's reflection, but can they get a message to him in time?

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Luffy finally catches up with Sanji! However, as a happy past plays before his eyes in which he, Sanji, and the crew deepened their bonds, a new page is turning in the history of the Straw Hats.

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Sanji's journey with the crew looks to be coming to an end!

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Luffy makes a solemn promise to not move from his spot until Sanji returns to him. But as Mama's army advances, that promise may prove a costly one. Meanwhile, Sanji and the Vinsmokes come face to face with Big Mom and his bride-to-be Pudding!

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Luffy stands his ground and waits for his friend to return! But the vengeful army washes over him - only a true friend can step in to turn the tide of battle! Meanwhile, Sanji and Pudding discuss their marriage - and come to a startling conclusion!

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Luffy puts his all into battling Big Mom's vengeful army, however, their skills combined prove too formidable. Meanwhile, Sanji goes to Big Mom herself to bargain for the Straw Hats lives - with shocking results!

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Chopper and Carrot are captured by Brulee and strung up for dinner! But Chopper sees a chance to free himself! Meanwhile, Brook and Pedro launch a plan to reach the Ponegliffs - a daring game of chance!

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Pekoms creates a diversion for Brook to set his plan into action. Meanwhile, Luffy continues to goad Big Mom into a fight, and Pudding begins to have stirrings of rebellion herself!

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Just when Luffy and Nami are in Big Mom's grasp, Pudding arrives, but with news that they aren't expecting - meanwhile Brook and Chopper both make headway getting out of their own jams!

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Sanji hopes his wedding with Pudding will solve the Straw Hat's predicament - but Pudding secretly plans to to avoid the marriage, sharing a secret with Luffy. Meanwhile, Brook comes face to face with Big Mom herself!

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Luffy tries desperately to free himself as the risk of his own well-being! Meanwhile, Chopper and Carrot continue to search the mirror universe, Brook squares off against Big Mom, and Pedro's past is revealed!

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Luffy struggles to break himself free as Sanji falls deeper in love with the idea of marrying Pudding... But the mask falls off and the deadly charade of Big Mom is revealed as the depths of her treachery come to light!

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Brook continues his all-out struggle against Big Mom, but his secret weapon might not be enough to save him! Meanwhile, an unexpected ally from the past comes to the rescue!

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Jimbei arrives on the scene and works to free Luffy and Nami! Meanwhile Sanji confronts his sister with the awful truth of Pudding, and she confides in him the powerful secret of their mother's undying love!

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Brook finds himself totally at the whim of Big Mom, and comes face to face with her brutal love! Meanwhile, Pedro reveals his explosive plan to create a distraction!

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Chopper and Carrot use the mirror dimension to get in touch with Nami and Jimbei! Luffy makes it through more obstacles to learn that he just missed Sanji! Meanwhile, Sanji wonders alone about the best course of action.

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Brook hears Big Mom's plan firsthand as she shares her intentions with Pudding in front of him! Meanwhile, Big Mom's agents believe most of the Straw Hats to be under control, but doubt besets Montd'Or.

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Nami and the others finally find Brook in the mirror dimension - but he's in the most inopportune of places! Can they challenge the sleeping Mama and rescue their friend? Meanwhile, Luffy is waylaid on his way back to the rendezvous!

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Luffy puts up a valiant fight in order to keep his word to Sanji! But will he be able to last until Sanji arrives at the rendezvous? Meanwhile, Jimbei shares the awful truth about the wedding with the other Straw Hats.

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Sanji and Luffy meet finally - and while he is happy to feed Luffy to replenish his energy, Sanji's explanation of what actions he must take baffles Luffy! The crucial decision, to turn his back on his friends or his family, tears Sanji apart!

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: The newly reunited Luffy and Sanji hear from the rest of the Straw Hats in the mirror dimension! Then, Jimbei starts telling them about Capone "Gang" Bege and proposes a shocking plan to take down Big Mom!

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: The Straw Hats put Jimbei's plan into action and approach Bege with the possibility of an alliance. But before they are granted an audience, they must make themselves presentable!

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: The proposed alliance between the Straw Hats and Bege unfolds! A gaseous blast from the past, Gastino, a member of Bege's team, reveals the secret weapon that the team plans to use against the Emperor!

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Now, the assassination plan of Big Mom is all set and everyone starts preparing for the Tea Party. Montd'Or finds one of his crewmates, Bobbin the Disposer, dead, and suspects Sanji and Luffy of the crime.

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: The day has arrived! Guests from the criminal underground pour in droves, but some have their own agendas to settle! Big Mom's sons, however, stand in their way and show them what they've got! Meanwhile, Luffy is preparing for his own plan!

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Final preparations abound on all sides and multiple plots start to come together! But can Sanji keep his nerve and go through with the plan? Or will Pudding's beauty prove too enchanting?

programme.title: Four Brothers

programme.title: Pati's Mexican Table

programme.title: Pati's Mexican Table

programme.desc: It was autumn of 1988, and an evil monster, responsible For committing a series of gruesome murders, was stalking the streets of London.

programme.desc: For four years during WWI, a life was lost every 25 seconds. After the carnage, a new age of prosperity and celebration was expected. However, it would not be so simple. The economy and society had a lot of recovering to do.

programme.title: Impossible Peace
programme.desc: In effort to keep peace, treaties were proposed to keep the aggressors of World War 1 under-armed. The ratio of military power was drastically in favor of the US and Great Britain. This might have successfully kept peace, if it was only given a chance.

programme.title: Impossible Peace
programme.desc: Exchange rates and floundering economies were not the only things influencing how and where people lived. The motor-car and other technological advances were transformative, though some clung tight to the past...

programme.title: Impossible Peace
programme.desc: As Paris lurched into 1929, it seemed on the surface (to those with deep pockets) that the party would go on forever. However, few saw the impending future claiming that these people were just hiding away from a harsh reality.

programme.title: Impossible Peace
programme.desc: In the 20s there seemed to be some good candidates for leadership in Europe. But where were these people when the great depression hits, affecting the lives of people around the world?

programme.title: Impossible Peace
programme.desc: As the effect of the depression in the US became clear, Japanese businessmen began to think that America would never recover. They then set their focus on East Asia, where the invasion of Manchuria had doubled the size of the Japanese empire.

programme.title: Impossible Peace
programme.desc: No one knows for sure if early action would have stopped Adolph Hitler's ambition. But we do know that inaction certainly didn't. Buy why did neighboring countries refuse to act early? One word: Appeasement.

programme.title: Impossible Peace
programme.desc: Some saw the idea of appeasement as the salvation of peace. Some were so blinded by it, that they either didn't see or ignored, Hitler's all too obvious strategic manipulation of territories.

programme.title: The Making of the Mob

programme.title: The Making of the Mob

programme.title: Crawl

programme.title: Silent House

programme.title: The Haunting

programme.desc:
May grew up as a lonely oddball whose only friend was a perfectly kept doll. When she moves to L.A., she takes up with a handsome filmmaker and then an alluring lesbian, but every connection she makes turns out deadly.
Rated R

programme.title: Intervention
programme.desc: Seven years and three kids later, Lauren's father died and she turned to pills to cope. By the time she realized she was hooked, Lauren had lost her kids.

programme.title: Dr. G: Medical Examiner
programme.desc: Dr. Farley discusses the bizarre case of a pregnant mother who suddenly dies. As the autopsy unfolds, Dr. Farley uncovers information that could have saved her and her unborn child’s life.

programme.title: Dr. G: Medical Examiner
programme.desc: Roy Cambells is found dead and covered with scratches, his aggressive 80lb dog by his side. Dr. G wonders if the dog could have been responsible for the man's death.

programme.title: Dr. G: Medical Examiner

programme.title: Dr. G: Medical Examiner

programme.title: Dr. G: Medical Examiner

programme.title: Dr. G: Medical Examiner
programme.desc: Police patrolling the night streets hear gunshots and head to the scene. They find a nude middle-aged man in a parking lot lying face down in a puddle of blood.

programme.title: The First 48
programme.desc: In Charlotte, rookie homicide Det. Brian Whitworth is assigned his first case when a woman is discovered on her bedroom floor, stabbed to death.

programme.title: The First 48
programme.desc: In Louisville, Det. Kristen Downs is at a dead end in her search for the killer of a wheelchair bound man, until she discovers the victim's sons might be the key to the case.

programme.title: The First 48
programme.desc: After a year with the gang unit, Detective Kevin Ruggiero returns to Miami Homicide, investigating a drive-by shooting that left two men dead.

programme.title: The First 48
programme.desc: When Louisville Detectives Mickey Cohn and Jon Lesher discover that their two murder victims have matching tattoos, they suspect the murders might be related.

programme.title: I Shouldn't Be Alive
programme.desc: Private plane crashes in the Kalahari Desert. Two of the surviving passengers decide to leave their injured party behind without food or water in order to find help.

programme.title: I Shouldn't Be Alive
programme.desc: November 2003, brothers Justin and Jeremy Harris go canyoneering in Utah's Canyons. They expect the trip will take no more than eight hours, but when freezing temperatures come by, Justin breaks his leg and Jeremy has to hike out to find help.

programme.title: I Shouldn't Be Alive
programme.desc: In April 1999, three British climbers get caught in a snowstorm near the summit of Mt. McKinley. After a night in a cave, one climber develops snow blindness and another volunteer to go down to base camp but breaks both his legs in a fall.

programme.title: Soviet Storm: World War II in the East
programme.desc: After the failure to take both Moscow and Leningrad, Hitler sets his sights on the oil fields in the Caucasus. If captured, the Red Army will lose 70%-90% of all its oil resources. Therefore, the city on Volga, Stalingrad, must be 'held at all costs.

programme.title: Soviet Storm: World War II in the East

programme.title: Soviet Storm: World War II in the East

programme.title: Impossible Peace

programme.title: WWII In Color: From D-Day to Nazi Downfall
programme.desc: Airborne troops flood the Netherlands as 50,000 tanks surge from Belgium. However, stronger-than-expected German forces resist fiercely, causing the ambitious operation to falter.

programme.title: WWII In Color: From D-Day to Nazi Downfall
programme.desc: Market Garden stalls with tragedy at Arnhem, stalemate at Nijmegen, and chaos elsewhere. Outnumbered 4 to 1 in places, even Montgomery's gamble can't overcome the mounting odds.

programme.title: WWII In Color: From D-Day to Nazi Downfall
programme.desc: Eisenhower halts Monty's costly gamble as British forces retreat before destruction. Heavy casualties and strategic failures haunt the Allies, with lasting effects for the war's remainder.

programme.title: WWII In Color: From D-Day to Nazi Downfall
programme.desc: After six months of retreat across Northern Europe, Adolf Hitler's forces on the Western Front are back behind Germany's borders.

programme.title: WWII In Color: From D-Day to Nazi Downfall
programme.desc: American forces reel from the impact of massive surprise attack along an 80-mile front in The Ardennes Forest.

programme.title: WWII In Color: From D-Day to Nazi Downfall
programme.desc: As the last Nazi offensive of the war develops, the vicious SS Panzer resort to murder, a dangerous fifth column slips into the American camp causing chaos and confusion, and the desperate defense of a key Belgian town seems doomed.

programme.title: WWII In Color: From D-Day to Nazi Downfall
programme.desc: Eisenhower brings in the Airborne Divisions to reinforce the Allied front lines, a legendary US General leads a furious charge up country to relieve the surrounded town of Bastogne, and Hitler panics as the German offensive begins to stall.

programme.title: WWII In Color: From D-Day to Nazi Downfall

programme.title: La ronca de Oro
programme.desc: Pepe se reivindica con Helena promocionándola en Medellín, pero Germán mueve influencias para evitar su ascenso. La pareja viaja a España por el nombramiento de Germán como Embajador.

programme.title: La ronca de Oro
programme.desc: Germán mantiene controlada a Helena en la casa y no le permite comunicarse con su familia de ninguna forma, pero a pesar de esto, Carme, le ayuda al entregarle una correspondencia.

programme.title: La ronca de Oro

programme.title: Cops

programme.title: Cops
programme.desc: La policía intenta atrapar a un sospechoso por robo de vehículo armado. La policía llega a una escena caótica y un testigo aclara las cosas. Un ciclista rezongón culpa su forma de ser en animé.

programme.title: Cops

programme.title: Cops

programme.title: Cops

programme.title: Cops

programme.title: Cops

programme.title: Cops
programme.desc: Un hombre llama a la policía cuando ve un robo en la licorería. Un conductor pierde a su amiga cuando le roba su camioneta. Los oficiales le sugieren a un joven que sea mejor ejemplo para su hermano.

programme.title: Cops

programme.title: Cops

programme.title: Cops

programme.title: Cops

programme.desc: Un motociclista causa una persecución por las calles. Ni un carro que no prende impide que un hombre corra de la policía. Un conductor no logra evadir a la policía y se disculpa raramente con su novia.

programme.title: Star Trek: Voyager

programme.title: Star Trek: Voyager

programme.title: Stargate Atlantis

programme.desc: With the need for food and water becoming dire, Dr. Rush manages to find a planet within range that seems viable but can only be accessed by shuttle. When nearing the planet, they encounter violent turbulence and must make a dangerous crash landing.

programme.title: Stargate Universe
programme.desc: The Destiny is on a collision course with an ancient ship found floating in space. Panic turns to wonder as the ships dock with each other. The crew discovers that it might hold the key to a connection back to Earth and other hidden secrets.

programme.title: Stargate Universe

programme.title: Stargate Universe

programme.title: Stargate SG-1
programme.desc: Mistaken for rebels on an alien planet, SG-1 must play the part of hostage takers in hopes to buy themselves enough time to be rescued before they're executed. Starring Ben Browder, Amanda Tapping, Christopher Judge, and Michael Shanks.

programme.title: Stargate SG-1
programme.desc: Barely surviving the bombing massacre of a peaceful Jaffa summit, Teal'c (Christopher Judge) must go rogue to track down and stop a Jaffa leader named Arkad (Craig Fairbrass) who plans to take control of the Jaffa nation and deliver them to the Ori.

programme.title: Stargate SG-1

programme.title: Stargate SG-1
programme.desc: In an elaborate plan using Vala Mal Doran (Claudia Black) as bait to capture Adria (guest star Morena Baccarin), SG-1 themselves are surprised when Ba'al (guest star Cliff Simon) intercepts Adria from under them to use in his own evil plan.

programme.title: Stargate SG-1
programme.desc: With extinction imminent, the Asgard hand over all their knowledge and technology to SG-1, but not before the Ori launch an attack trying to intercede. Starring Ben Browder, Amanda Tapping, Christopher Judge, Beau Bridges, and Michael Shanks.

programme.title: Stargate SG-1
programme.desc: As Colonel Jack O'Neill and his team journey to Abydos to confront deadly warriors and laser-firing Death Gliders, O'Neill realizes that this new mission seems hauntingly familiar and that an old enemy has returned to take his revenge on Earth.

programme.title: Stargate SG-1

programme.title: Charmed
programme.desc: Piper tells Leo that she loves him, but she will only tell Dan one week later since he is traveling.

programme.title: Charmed

programme.title: Ghost Whisperer

programme.title: Ghost Whisperer
programme.desc: The ghost of an African American man attacked and killed during a fight with a white co-worker in the 1970's, haunts the former prosecutor turned judge.

programme.title: Ghost Whisperer
programme.desc: When Melinda falls and injures her head, she wakes up to a world without ghosts and fears she has lost her "gift".

programme.desc: Following the jetliner crash just outside of Grandview,Melinda tries to get the confused ghost passengers to crossover,but she encounters an evil spirit who is working against her to keep the ghosts earthbound for "work" he has to do.

programme.title: Ghost Whisperer

programme.title: Charmed
programme.desc: While studying for the finals in the library, Phoebe meets Charlene, who is researching about demons for her thesis.

programme.title: Teen Mom OG
programme.desc: Amber is shocked when Gary asks her to move onto his property. Catelynn pursues a career in microblading while Mackenzie accepts a job opportunity in Florida. Bentley starts therapy and Maci is heartbroken when she finds out he feels neglected.

programme.title: Teen Mom OG

programme.title: Teen Mom OG

programme.title: Teen Mom OG

programme.title: Teen Mom OG
programme.desc: After discovering that a staff member at Nova's old daycare is a sex offender, Catelynn and Tyler decide to talk to Nova about protecting herself. Mackenzie struggles starting her new job in Florida and taking care of the kids without Josh.

programme.title: Teen Mom OG
programme.desc: Cheyenne and Zach's families pressure them to get married while Mackenzie and Josh give their marriage another chance in Florida. For the first time ever, Catelynn and Tyler decide to vote in the Presidential Election.

programme.title: Teen Mom OG

programme.title: Teen Mom OG

programme.title: Teen Mom OG

programme.desc: Amber wants to pursue a college degree in Psychology. Mackenzie and Josh seek professional help for Broncs. Catelynn tries to understand Tyler's ketamine treatment. Cheyenne is devastated when her sister decides to move to DC.

programme.title: Pasión de gavilanes

programme.title: Pasión de gavilanes

programme.title: Pasión de gavilanes

programme.title: Los herederos del monte
programme.desc: La verdad atormenta a Juan, sabe que Pedro tiene razón al asegurar que él no ama a Julieta y siente que está pecando al pensar en Paula. Los novios interrumpen la luna de miel y van a la clínica para ver a Pedro.

programme.title: Los herederos del monte
programme.desc: Julieta le grita a Juan su traición, al dejarle claro que sabe de su infidelidad con Paula antes de llegar al altar y jurarle amor a ella y a su hijo. A Pedro le dan de alta en el hospital. José le dice a Juan que sabe que Paula es su amante.

programme.title: Los herederos del monte
programme.desc: Juan descubre el juego sucio de Paula y Pedro, pero Julieta quiere dar pelea por su corazón. Ella lo reta a desafiar a su amante si quiere seguir con su matrimonio, le exige que eche a Paula y a su madre de la hacienda.

programme.title: Los herederos del monte
programme.desc: Julieta se enfrenta a Paula con Juan para vengar su juego sucio y demostrarle que puede ganarle la guerra por el amor de su esposo. Juan le dice que no tienen ningún derecho sobre la hacienda hasta que no salga la posesión efectiva de la herencia.

programme.title: La patrona

programme.title: La patrona

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Wednesday and Pugsley return in tears from trick-or-treating because a neighbor has told them there is no such thing as a witch. Morticia and Gomez plan to prove to the children that they do exist--by summoning a witch to a séance.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Determined to correct the dreadful literature that Wednesday and Pugsley are exposed to, Morticia sets out to create a new literary world. Gomez fears that his wife's first manuscript is so good, that once the publisher reads it he will lose her.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: In need of artistic fulfillment, Morticia takes up sculpting. An art critic views her first endeavor--a three-eyed Gomez statue--and clubs it with his cane. Gomez, who won't have Morticia's heart broken gets a seedy art dealer to buy it.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Pugsley copies one of his dad's old love letters and sends it to his teacher. Miss Dunbar comes to visit the Addams home and confesses to Gomez that no man has ever fallen so in love with her, leading Morticia to pretend to be the jealous wife.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: After Wednesday befriends a new boy her age, Robespierre Courtney, Morticia invites his parents, Mr. and Mrs. Henry Courtney to visit the Addams house for tea. Unbeknownst to them, the Courtney's are hoping to meet a number of the social set.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: There is a neighborhood burglar on the loose, and Morticia has reason to believe it could be Gomez. Morticia decides to probe his subconscious mind for a key to his criminality after she and Uncle Fester discover loot hidden in the storeroom.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Morticia's pet plant Cleopatra gobbles up her favorite photo of Gomez from the family album. When the original photographer is found and asked to make a duplicate picture, it is discovered that he is now with the Department of Motor Vehicles.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Gomez plays host to Don Xavier Molines, a family friend during his childhood in Spain, and his daughter Consuella. Morticia's hospitality is put to the test when Consuella reveals that she has been promised in marriage to Gomez since childhood.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: When Wednesday's and Pugsley's faith in Santa Claus is shaken, Uncle Fester is chosen to back up Santa in case the real St. Nick is too busy to come. However, Fester-Santa gets stuck in the chimney, so each of the other adults fills in for him.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Fester is so smitten upon receipt of a photo of his love, a bearded carnival lady, that he borrows stamp money to mail her a proposal. Morticia dons a beard and poses as the mother to convince Fester that he will have to work to support a wife.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Because she thinks Fester (Jackie Coogan) and Grandmama (Blossom Rock) are spoiling the children, Morticia (Carolyn Jones) hires a governess. Insulted, Fester paints a white line down the center of the Addams house, dividing it in half.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Morticia and Gomez see Fester conferring with TV muscleman Jack LaGrann (Jack LaLanne), and think that Fester is planning a television career. However, Uncle Fester confides to Lurch that he has to go on a secret diet and exercise.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Morticia and Gomez find Grandfather Pegleg's treasure map and summon Captain Grimby. They hope to charter his boat for the treasure hunt. But after meeting the Captain, Morticia is careful to keep the nature of the mission secret.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Ophelia Frump is madly in love with Horatio Bartholomew, the man who has everything, except the truth about her relatives. Morticia, not convinced by Bartholomew, persuades playboy Cousin Itt to stir the embers of his past romance with Ophelia.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Pugsley shocks his parents when he gives up his new atomic reactor as kid stuff and announces that he wants to find his own job. His first try is as a medical assistant to Dr. Bird. He turns up, scalpel in hand, ready to help during an operation.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Grandma Frump (guest star Margaret Hamilton), comes to the mistaken conclusion that her daughter, Morticia (Carolyn Jones), and Gomez (John Astin) plan to pack her off to an old folks home. Actually, they plan to send her to a beauty farm.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Morticia, in order to be part of the National Beautification Program, decides to become a home decorator and offers her services to the neighbors. Next door neighbor, and insurance agent, Joe Digby hires Morticia in hopes of selling them insurance.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Ophelia taunts Uncle Fester into announcing that he is going to join the Peace Corps. Fester feels he's a cinch to be accepted because Gomez plans to pull strings in Washington on his behalf. The entire family agrees to help him study for the exam.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Allyn Joslyn guest-stars as Sam Hilliard, a former truant officer who now heads a private school where Wednesday and Pugsley are enrolled. When Hilliard breaks under the strain of dealing with the Addams children, Gomez buys the school.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Dr. Marvin P. Gunderson is summoned to examine Kitty Kat, the ailing lion pet of the Addams Family. Morticia decides that it is the doctor who needs help. To build his confidence, human members of the family pretend to be ill so he can effect cures.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Morticia's concern that Lurch is overworked leads Gomez to the operating table to assemble a custom-built secondary butler. Lurch lets the robot do all the work and then begins to feel that he isn't needed anymore.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: When Uncle Fester incinerates the family's stuffed bear with his flamethrower, Morticia reports the accident to the insurance company. Mr. Henson the head of the company, sends his assistant, Mr. Digby, to handle the case.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Lurch suffers from unrequited love over Tiny Trivia (guest star Diane Jergens), Morticia's visiting school chum who only has eyes for show business. The entire family decides to try to turn their stolid butler into a new personality.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: When Ophelia laments that she has been jilted, Morticia suggests a career as an alternative to marriage. She tries chemistry first (with explosive results) then turns to operatic singing. Cousin Itt is summoned to coach her to stardom.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Morticia and Gomez decide to keep Wednesday and Pugsley home from school after Morticia sees the fairy tales they have to read. When the truant officer comes to investigate, he is shocked at what he finds.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Morticia calls a psychiatrist after she fears Pugsley is becoming normal after he abandons his pet octopus for a puppy and is seen wearing a Boy Scout uniform, playing with a baseball bat, and helping an old lady cross the street.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Uncle Fester, who has become lonely, convinces Gomez and Morticia that it is time for him to find a bride. He decides to put an ad in the newspaper, looking for love. But things go awry when a door-to-door saleswoman comes by.

programme.title: The Amazing Race
programme.desc: For the first time in THE AMAZING RACE history, teams travel to Yerevan, Armenia, where an express pass is on the line for the winner of the leg.

programme.title: The Amazing Race
programme.desc: Teams travel to the country of Georgia where they learn how to make a traditional candy and go deep into the trenches at an old Georgian winery.

programme.title: The Amazing Race
programme.desc: Teams travel to Dubai where they race camels and swim with sharks.

programme.title: The Amazing Race
programme.desc: In a tight race to the mat, teams row and swim to the Pit Stop located on a boat, where the losers walk the plank and are eliminated.

programme.title: The Amazing Race
programme.desc: Racers embark on a gut wrenching, 40-foot plunge and teams make a difficult decision when faced with a double U-turn.

programme.title: The Amazing Race
programme.desc: The final four teams race for a spot in the finale and a high-stakes foot race to the mat will mark the end of one more team's journey.

programme.title: The Amazing Race
programme.desc: As the final three teams race from Shenzhen, China to Santa Barbara, Calif. for the final leg of the Race, they face a gut-wrenching leap of faith.

programme.title: The Amazing Race
programme.desc: In a brand new twist, all 22 Racers are complete strangers who will meet on the starting line. Before "GO," Racers will immediately compete in a challenge that will determine the order for picking a Teammate, based on nothing but first impressions.

programme.title: The Amazing Race
programme.desc: Teams travel to Sao Paulo, Brazil where tensions rise between two teams when one goes back on their word.

programme.title: The Amazing Race
programme.desc: Racers travel to Zanzibar, Tanzania where teams build and deliver desks to a local school. Also, tensions rise when teams face a blind double U-turn, and one team's Race may be in jeopardy when they misplace their passports.

programme.title: The Amazing Race
programme.desc: A previously played U-turn causes friction between two teams in Tanzania.

programme.title: The Amazing Race
programme.desc: Racers take on a record setting Roadblock by helping build a 13-story bonfire in Norway.

programme.title: The Amazing Race
programme.desc: Several teams come together and target one set of Racers at the double U-turn in Italy.

programme.title: The Amazing Race
programme.desc: Teams race through Venice, Italy where one team reaches a breaking point in a frantic search for a water taxi.

programme.desc: Howard Morris guest stars as Ernest T. Bass as the Darling clan returns to Mayberry with its own kind of mountain trouble.

programme.title: Martha Cooks

programme.title: Martha Cooks

programme.title: Martha Cooks

programme.title: Martha Cooks

programme.title: Martha Cooks

programme.title: The New Detectives
programme.desc: Formed in the 1830s to protect settlers against Indian attack, the Rangers became part of the Texas Highway Patrol in 1935. Their role has continued to evolve to keep up with changing times; today it includes sophisticated forensics labs.

programme.title: The New Detectives
programme.desc: A victim usually never foresees danger when the perpetrator turns out to be a friend or a lover. Science and microscopic evidence can unmask these killers and find justice for those who are Loved To Death.

programme.title: The New Detectives
programme.desc: When a murder is committed and deceit clouds the evidence, investigators turn to science and technology to uncover the truth and expose a murderous lie and capture the killer.

programme.title: The New Detectives
programme.desc: The forces of nature can reduce a body to bones in a matter of weeks. Using a unique combination of art and science, forensic anthropologists give victims a face long after they have been forgotten.

programme.title: The New Detectives
programme.desc: An abandoned car outside Philadelphia brings heartbreak to a family and terror to a community. A young woman is dead, the killer gone. But the marks of his passage remain.

programme.title: The New Detectives
programme.desc: Most victims of multiple murderers are meticulously chosen because of a mutual connection with the killer or because they match an intricate set of criteria that fits the killer's MO.

programme.title: The New Detectives
programme.desc: Terrorism: Thanks to new technology and, perhaps, the approaching millennium, terrorism is a growing international threat. The Oklahoma City explosion and the bombing of the World Trade Center are just two of the incidents of this growing problem.

programme.title: The New Detectives
programme.desc: For the forensic entomologist, the insects that nest in dead bodies are like tiny witnesses to a crime.

programme.title: The New Detectives
programme.desc: A dog can be a dead man's best friend. Dogs have been trained to sniff out corpses, drugs, explosives, and missing persons. They're often the first to find the essential clue that sets an investigation in motion.

programme.title: The New Detectives
programme.desc: Explosives Investigations: The crime lab is the place where science meets murder. In New York State, Eleanor Fowler opened a small package, which as mailed to her home. When she lifted the lid the box exploded killing her instantly.

programme.title: The New Detectives
programme.desc: They know as much about crime as any crime fighter, or any criminal. They're the crime writers, and through their eyes we see murder most foul.

programme.title: The New Detectives
programme.desc: Time of death is an important consideration in a murder investigation, but when a killer freezes, burns, or grinds his victim, even the most skilled medical examiner would be at a loss about how to calculate it.

programme.title: The New Detectives
programme.desc: Hiding a body can be difficult; it's sometimes easier to obscure or disguise the circumstances of the death, turning murder into suicide, or pinning the blame on someone else. The truth is told through subtle clues taken from the crime scene.

programme.title: The New Detectives
programme.desc: There are several things that can suggest murder; jealousy, anger, poison…When everyday substances reveal hidden clues that break a homicide case, those substances become the elements of murder.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: A famous gunfighter marries and decides to retire. He and his wife settle down in North Fork and open a store, but three outlaws arrive in town looking to best him in a gunfight.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: An old friend of Lucas McCain's, a traveling photographer, comes to North Fork plying his trade. When a murder is committed, the photographer is accused of the crime.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: The townsfolk of North Fork decide to give a young couple a shivaree celebration. When the drunken crowd gets out of hand and roughs up the bride-to-be, the young groom challenges them.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: When a young boy from Brooklyn is accused of murder, Mark, believing the boy's claim of innocence, hides him until he can find the real killer.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: U.S. Marshal Sam Buckhart arrives in North Fork in search of renegade Indians suspected of the brutal killing of a Texas Ranger and his family.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: Sid Fallon tries to blackmail former gambler Julia Andueza into allowing him to use her boarding house as a gambling hall and saloon.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: Lucas puts his life in jeopardy when he agrees to testify in a murder case where the first witness was killed before he could testify, and the killer is still at large.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: Outlaw Sam Morley falls in love with a young woman who has a serious illness and asks Lucas to turn him in for the reward and use the money to pay for her medical care.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: Lucas welcomes his old friend Tom Birch, who once saved his life, unaware that the man is now a bank robber on the run with his gang.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: Dan Maury, released from Yuma prison, arrives in North Fork intent on getting even with Marshal Torrance, who helped send him to jail.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: Young Mark McCain is eager to help lawman Jay Jefferson, who has arrived in North Fork intent on killing an outlaw for the reward, whether he is the right man or not.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: Lucas comes to the rescue when escaped convicts hold up the general store in North Fork and take Marshall Torrance hostage.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: Young Mark manages to capture a hawk but falls into danger with a rattlesnake. A stranger comes to his rescue and Mark invites the man home, unaware that he is on the run from the law.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: Lucas takes in an orphaned teen being raised by his abusive uncle after there is trouble at the school.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: The McCains try to be tolerant of their embittered neighbor Abel MacDonald, but they decide he's gone too far when he won't allow his injured boy to get medical treatment.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: An unfounded rumor causes North Fork's outspoken feminist schoolteacher to be attacked by a mob of angry townspeople.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: When his employer begins to suspect him of embezzlement, bookkeeper Asa Manning decides to hire a professional gunman to take care of the problem.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: A drought has forced local cowhands to seek work on a railroad construction project, but executives are afraid workers will desert them if they believe an old man's claim of making rain.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: Lucas McCain gives blood to save a dying man and is surprised by Marshall Torrance's odd behavior towards him. Soon, men arrive from a nearby town and demand custody of the man.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: When Mark finds of the body of a murder victim, Lucas, his friend Artemus and Marshall Torrance begin a search for the killer.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: When renegade Apaches wound Lucas and kidnap Mark, Marshall Torrance joins with U.S. Marshall Sam Buckhart to form a rescue posse.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: Lucas is the town's representative to the railroad commission until an infamous train robber dies and leaves his ill-gotten wealth to Lucas. Lucas must clear his name.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: When a rancher dies after the bank forecloses the mortgage on his property, his son blames the banker for his father's death.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: When a wealthy rancher is killed, Mark suggests that they seek the aid of a mind reader to identify the murderer.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: A group of outlaws devise a plan to get rid of Lucas so that they can take over the town of North Fork.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: After Lucas kills a mountain man in a brawl, his father arrives in North Fork to break his other boys out of jail and take revenge on Lucas and Marshall Torrance.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: Newly arrived gunslinger Al Walker throws a mammoth party at the saloon, keeping acting Marshall Ben Waller busy until Lucas is forced to intervene.

programme.desc: Vollmer, a small-time neo-Nazi, takes advice from a shadowy benefactor on how to increase his followers.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone

programme.title: The Twilight Zone
